_defaults.dressCode: Modest dress recommended. Follow site-specific rules at the entrance.

temples.name: Solomon's Temple
temples.description: A major religious site in Aizawl, listed by Mizoram Tourism and the Aizawl district administration.

temples.name: Shiv Mandir, Aizawl

temples.name: Kamalanagar Buddhist Temple
temples.description: A Buddhist temple at Kamalanagar, the headquarters of the Chakma Autonomous District Council.

temples.name: Topobhumi Buddha Vihar
temples.description: A Buddhist temple in Kamalanagar, Lawngtlai district.
